senior_laravel_dev.headline: Senior Laravel Developer
senior_laravel_dev.summary: Backend engineer specialising in Laravel APIs, Vue frontends, and PostgreSQL at scale.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Led migration of monolith to Laravel 11 microservices serving 40k daily users
Built internal admin tooling with Vue 3 and Inertia

experience.title: PHP Developer
highlights: Maintained legacy PHP apps and introduced PHPUnit coverage

experience.title: Marketing Manager

Owned ABM campaigns targeting enterprise finance buyers

experience.title: Content Marketer
highlights: Launched company blog and case study programme

cybersecurity_analyst.headline: Security Operations Analyst
cybersecurity_analyst.summary: SOC analyst with SIEM tuning, incident triage, and threat hunting experience.

experience.title: Security Operations Analyst
highlights: Triaged 200+ alerts weekly in Splunk ES with 15-minute SLA
Co-authored runbooks for phishing and ransomware playbooks

swedish_product_designer.headline: Produktdesigner

career_changer_teacher.headline: Junior Full Stack Developer

experience.title: Junior Developer

Pair programmed with seniors on REST API integrations

experience.title: Maths Teacher
highlights: Taught GCSE and A-level classes of 30 students

data_analyst.summary: Analyst turning warehouse data into dashboards and executive insights.

experience.title: Data Analyst
highlights: Built Tableau suite tracking store-level margin trends
Automated weekly SQL reports saving 6 analyst hours

nurse_healthcare.headline: Registered Nurse
nurse_healthcare.summary: Acute care nurse with ward leadership and patient safety audit experience.

experience.title: Staff Nurse
highlights: Led shift handovers on a 28-bed medical ward
Championed infection control audits with 98% compliance

sales_executive.headline: Enterprise Account Executive
sales_executive.summary: B2B SaaS seller closing mid-market deals with consultative discovery.

experience.title: Account Executive
highlights: Closed $1.2M ARR across 14 mid-market accounts in 2024
Exceeded quota three consecutive years

freelance_ux.headline: Freelance UX Consultant
freelance_ux.summary: Independent UX consultant for fintech and health clients with private client work.

experience.title: Product Designer
highlights: Shipped mobile banking onboarding flows
